title: Ping
description: Inspired by Portal 2, this mod brings the Ping tool into Minecraft
body:
![Ping banner](http://i.imgur.com/AeKobBv.png)

 

Inspired by Portal 2, this mod brings the Ping tool into Minecraft

  
This mod attempts to replicate that feature in a useful way, but ensure it actually has use in the Minecraft world.

 

**How to use**  
Using Ping is incredibly simple. Both the server and client must have it installed. To send a Ping, simply hold down the **V** key, and select a ping type by either mousing over it and releasing **V**, or by clicking on it. A Ping will then be sent to everyone within range (Configureable).
On the experience bar (locator bar) a small icon will help you better locate the location/direction of the ping.

 

![Ping Example](http://imgur.com/782LJtW.png)

 

_**Modpack permissions**_

Feel free to use Ping in any kind of modpack, as long as you link back to this page and don’t make any money of the modpack.

_**Credits**_
* dmillerw, the original creator of Mine Menu - before I took over in 2016
